subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention and glorification, befitteth the Most Exalted Word, from Whose fragrances the realm of names and attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و ثنا کلمه علیا را لایق و سزا که از نفحاتش عالم اسماء و صفات
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Word of God and human limitations, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
